score_notes.purine: Hot dogs and corn dog nuggets are pork/beef-based (red meat, moderate purine per Kaneko); chili and cheese toppings add to the load.
score_notes.fructose: Fountain sodas, lemonade, and a brownie sundae push fructose load to moderate-high.
score_notes.dehydration: Hot dogs, fries, and chili are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Buffet includes carved meats and fried chicken (moderate purine) alongside salads and vegetables (low purine), so the venue average lands in the middle.
score_notes.alcohol: Beer and wine are available at lunch/dinner but not a focal point of the meal.
score_notes.fructose: Buffet dessert table (cakes, cobblers) and soda fountain contribute meaningfully.
score_notes.dehydration: Varied buffet sodium; carved meats and gravies push it to moderate.

score_notes.purine: Mostly pastries and grab-and-go sandwiches (turkey/ham); low-to-moderate purine load.
score_notes.fructose: Frappuccinos, sweetened espresso drinks, and pastries carry a high sugar load.
score_notes.dehydration: Cured-meat sandwiches and salty pastries add moderate sodium.

score_notes.purine: Menu centers on beef burgers and patty melts (red meat, moderate purine).
score_notes.fructose: Famous for ice cream sundaes, milkshakes, and floats — high sugar load.
score_notes.dehydration: Burgers and fries are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Italian-American menu with meatballs and chicken parmesan (red meat/poultry, moderate purine); pasta and salad options are lower-purine alternatives.
score_notes.alcohol: Beer and wine are offered as part of the Italian dining experience.
score_notes.fructose: Tiramisu and soda are available, but not the centerpiece of the menu.
score_notes.dehydration: Tomato sauces and parmesan add moderate sodium.

score_notes.purine: Rotisserie chicken (poultry) and bacon cheeseburgers (red meat) are both moderate-purine; ribs at the higher end of poultry/red-meat range.
score_notes.fructose: Soft drinks and milkshakes available.
score_notes.dehydration: Rotisserie chicken and ribs are heavily seasoned/salted.

score_notes.purine: Pretzels (grain, low purine) but a turkey-leg/hot-dog option pushes the average to moderate.
score_notes.fructose: Frozen lemonade and slushies are sugar-heavy.
score_notes.dehydration: Soft pretzels with cheese sauce are very high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Burgers and plant-based options (Impossible burger); beef option keeps the venue average in the moderate red-meat range.
score_notes.alcohol: Beer is served when this seasonal location is open.
score_notes.fructose: Standard fountain soda menu.
score_notes.dehydration: Burgers and fries are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Beverage-only kiosk; negligible purine content.
score_notes.fructose: Frozen slushies and specialty sodas are sugar-dense.
score_notes.dehydration: No high-sodium food items.

score_notes.purine: Soft serve and fruit cups are dairy/fruit based — very low purine.
score_notes.fructose: Soft-serve sundaes and floats are high in added sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: No high-sodium food items.

score_notes.purine: Dinner menu features braised pork and filet mignon (red meat, moderate-to-high purine).
score_notes.alcohol: Wine is served at dinner; not the focus of the meal.
score_notes.fructose: Signature 'The Grey Stuff' dessert and sweetened lemonade contribute to fructose load.
score_notes.dehydration: Rich sauces and cured meats (croque monsieur at lunch) are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Meatball and chicken parmesan flatbreads are red meat/poultry, moderate purine.
score_notes.fructose: Standard fountain soda menu.
score_notes.dehydration: Flatbreads with cured meat and cheese are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Loaded tots with chili (ground beef, red meat) push purine to moderate; plain tots are lower.
score_notes.fructose: Mostly savory; soda is the main sugar source.
score_notes.dehydration: Chili-cheese tots are extremely high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Roasted turkey legs are poultry at the higher end of the Kaneko range.
score_notes.alcohol: LeFou's Brew is a non-alcoholic frozen apple-juice beverage despite the 'Tavern' name.
score_notes.fructose: LeFou's Brew and warm cinnamon rolls are very high in added sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: Turkey legs are heavily brined and extremely high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Whole fruit, churros, and pretzels are low-purine grain/fruit items.
score_notes.fructose: Churros and fruit cups carry moderate natural and added sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: Soft pretzels and popcorn add moderate sodium.

score_notes.purine: Ice cream and soft-serve are dairy-based — very low purine.
score_notes.fructose: Sundaes, floats, and milkshakes are high in added sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: No high-sodium food items.

score_notes.purine: Family-style Thanksgiving feast with turkey, pot roast, and ham (poultry and red meat, moderate-to-high purine).
score_notes.alcohol: Beer and wine are offered with the family-style meal.
score_notes.fructose: Seasonal pie and sweetened cranberry relish; soda available.
score_notes.dehydration: Roasted meats and gravies are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Fried fish (moderate-purine fish) and a lobster roll (moderate-purine shellfish) anchor the menu; a vegetarian chili offers a lower-purine option.
score_notes.fructose: Mostly savory; soda and sweet tea are the main sugar sources.
score_notes.dehydration: Fried fish, chowder, and chips are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Waffles, funnel cakes, and ice cream are very low-purine.
score_notes.fructose: Funnel cakes and chocolate-hazelnut waffles are among the highest sugar items in the park.
score_notes.dehydration: No high-sodium food items.

name: Pecos Bill Tall Tale Inn and Café

score_notes.purine: Beef taco salads, burgers, and nachos are red meat, moderate purine.
score_notes.fructose: Mostly savory build-your-own bowls; soda is the main sugar source.
score_notes.dehydration: Nacho toppings bar (cheese sauce, salsa, beans) is high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Chicken nuggets and fritters are poultry-based, moderate purine.
score_notes.fructose: Apple and pineapple fritters are deep-fried and sugar-glazed.
score_notes.dehydration: Fried items and dipping sauces add moderate sodium.

score_notes.purine: Roasted turkey legs are poultry at the higher end of the Kaneko range.
score_notes.fructose: Churros add a moderate sugar load.
score_notes.dehydration: Turkey legs are heavily brined and extremely high in sodium.

name: Jungle Navigation Co. Ltd. Skipper Canteen

score_notes.purine: Tamarind shrimp (moderate-purine shellfish) and char siu pork ribs (red meat) anchor the dinner menu.
score_notes.alcohol: Themed cocktails (e.g., 'Schweitzer Slammer') are a signature, prominently-marketed part of the experience.
score_notes.fructose: Tropical cocktails and desserts (e.g., 'Tipsy Tile' chocolate cake) carry meaningful sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: Marinades and sauces are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Pulled pork and chicken (red meat/poultry) are moderate purine.
score_notes.alcohol: Rum-based specialty drinks are offered when this seasonal location is open.
score_notes.fructose: BBQ sauces and soda contribute moderate sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: BBQ pulled pork and sauces are high in sodium.

score_notes.purine: Citrus swirl floats are fruit/dairy based — very low purine.
score_notes.fructose: Citrus swirl (soft serve + frozen orange juice) is high in added and natural sugar.
score_notes.dehydration: No high-sodium food items.

score_notes.purine: Dole Whip (pineapple soft serve) is fruit/dairy based — very low purine.
score_notes.fructose: Dole Whip floats are among the highest sugar treats in the park.
score_notes.dehydration: No high-sodium food items.
